turns.assistant: Mira leans in. "I trust Captain Doran with my life. He saved me at Redford."
The gulls wheel overhead as Kael points out the fishing boats coming in.
Kael pats a worn satchel. "Maps, mostly. And my father's compass — it never leaves me."
The baker waves them over, pressing warm rolls into their hands.
"The old mill's been abandoned for years," Kael says. "Nobody goes there."

turns.user: We meet Mira again after the Hall.
turns.assistant: Mira's jaw is tight. "Doran sold us out at the Hall. I despise him now — never speak his name kindly to me again."
The flames crackle. Kael stretches out, humming an old tune.
Kael nods approvingly at the well-kept blade.
"Storm's coming in from the east," Kael mutters, eyeing the clouds.

turns.user: We turn in for the night.
turns.assistant: Kael banks the fire low. "Sleep. I'll take first watch."

probes.query: How does Mira feel about Captain Doran?
